mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.3pp increase in the unemployment rate over 3 months signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in weakening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in housing starts and retail sales over 2 months signals a strengthening demand environment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST and RSAFS both rise > 5% in 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in industrial production signals a weakening supply environment, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% increase in the federal funds rate over 1 month signals a tightening monetary cycle, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in payroll employment and a decline in the unemployment rate over 2 months signals a strengthening labor market, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises > 1% and UNRATE falls > 0.2pp in 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening labor market periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in GDP signals a strengthening demand environment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in the federal funds rate and a decline in the consumer price index over 2 months signals a tightening monetary cycle with low inflation, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises > 0.5% and CPIAUCSL falls > 1% in 2 months
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with low inflation
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods with low inflation are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
